app.name: OTR
app.languagePreparing: This language is being prepared. Please try again later.
trips.title: All journeys
trips.description: Active, upcoming, and completed journeys in one place.
trips.empty.title: No journeys yet
trips.empty.description: Create your first group journey to start planning and capturing.
trips.search.empty: No journeys or itinerary items matched this keyword.
profile.ledger.title: My travel ledger
profile.ledger.description: Only shows the costs allocated to you across journeys, grouped by journey and category.
profile.ledger.noExpenses: No expenses recorded for this journey yet.
journeyCreate.title: Create a journey
journeyCreate.description: Set the basics, add travelers, then choose the cover and original photo storage.
journeyCreate.field.name: Name
journeyCreate.placeholder.name: Iceland 2026
journeyCreate.placeholder.aka: Bao Xiaobao B, separated by spaces, commas, / or ;
journeyCreate.akaHelp: Used by Capture and Planner to recognize this person in notes, voice and expenses.
journeyCreate.travelers.title: Who is traveling?
journeyCreate.travelers.description: Type a name to reuse people you have traveled with before. Their previous invite email and AKA will be filled in when available.
journeyCreate.travelers.emailAccess: Add each member's login email when you know it. When they sign in with that email, this journey will appear in their account. Email can also be filled in later from People.
journeyCreate.invites.title: Invite links are ready
journeyCreate.invites.description: Paste these directly to your friends.
journeyCreate.cover.title: Cover and storage
journeyCreate.cover.description: Use a URL, or generate a cover from the journey name and place.
journeyCreate.storage.title: Original photo storage
journeyCreate.storage.none.title: Do not upload originals
journeyCreate.storage.none.description: Keep compressed OTR photos only for now.
journeyCreate.storage.google.title: Google Drive
journeyCreate.storage.google.description: Save originals to the journey owner's Drive.
journeyCreate.storage.onedrive.title: Microsoft OneDrive
journeyCreate.storage.onedrive.descripti: Prepare OneDrive as the original-photo destination.
journeySettings.nameDescription: Only the journey owner can rename this journey.
journeySettings.title: Journey Settings
journeySettings.description: Manage the cover image, photo storage, exchange rates, and core journey configuration.
journeySettings.datesDescription: Only the journey owner can adjust the official start and end dates.
journeySettings.datesInvalid: End date cannot be earlier than start date.
journeySettings.datesNote: Changing these dates only updates the journey boundary. Existing plans, memories, and records outside the new range are kept.
journeySettings.coverDescription: Use an image URL for now. Uploading and choosing from journey photos can come later.
journeySettings.storageDescription: Journey will index photos, while original files stay in the selected cloud provider.
journeySettings.storage.google.descripti: Original photos stay in the journey owner's Google Drive.
journeySettings.storage.onedrive.descrip: Original photos stay in the journey owner's OneDrive.
journeySettings.storageSaved: Storage preference saved. OAuth connection comes next.
journeySettings.storageSaveError: Could not save storage preference. Run the latest storage migrations first.
journeySettings.storage.disconnectConfir: Disconnect Google Drive from this journey?
journeySettings.storage.disconnected: Google Drive disconnected from OTR. Existing Drive folders were not deleted.
journeySettings.storage.connected: Google Drive connected. Journey folders are ready.
journeySettings.storage.connectLogin: You must be logged in to connect Google Drive.
journeySettings.storage.connectError: Could not start Google Drive connection.
journeySettings.storage.ownerOnly: Only the journey owner can change photo storage. You can view the current status and open the connected cloud folder.
journeySettings.storage.nextStep: Current photo upload still uses Capture and the existing compressed image flow. Google Drive connection creates folders now; original-photo streaming comes next.
journeySettings.exchangeDescription: Expenses keep their original currency and are converted into {baseCurrency} using this journey's rate snapshot when created or edited. Refreshing rates will not recalculate historical expenses.
journeySettings.exchangeRefreshed: Exchange rates were regenerated using today's rates. Historical expenses were not recalculated.
journeySettings.exchangeEmpty: No foreign currencies have been used yet.
journeySettings.deleteDescription: Deleting removes this Journey and its related members, planner items, memories, and ledger records. This cannot be undone.
journeySettings.deleteNameError: Enter the full journey name before deleting.
ledger.title: Journey Ledger
ledger.audit.title: AI ledger audit
ledger.audit.description: Choose what to check. This only reports warnings and will not modify expenses.
ledger.audit.warning.lodgingCoverage.des: Some members do not have lodging cost coverage on these travel dates.
ledger.audit.warning.lodgingDuplicates.d: Some members have more than one lodging cost on the same travel date.
ledger.audit.warning.roundTripFlights.de: Some members have fewer than two flight cost records.
ledger.audit.warning.amountOutliers.desc: These entries are unusual after normalizing by people, nights, or days.
ledger.audit.warning.memberCategoryVaria: These categories have a large cost gap between travelers.
ledger.audit.noWarnings.title: No obvious warnings
ledger.audit.noWarnings.description: The selected checks did not find anything suspicious.
ledger.needsReviewFilter.title: Showing entries that need review
ledger.needsReviewFilter.description: These expenses are not complete yet, so settlement or personal totals may be unreliable until you update them.
ledger.noExpensesForDay: No expenses recorded for this day.
memory.indexingStarted: Saved. Indexing photo and detecting faces...
memory.indexingFailed: Memory saved, but photo indexing needs retry later.
activity.label: Activity
activity.title: Background jobs
activity.notice.uploadComplete: {uploaded} photos uploaded. Organizing photos in background...
activity.job.missingPayload: Job is missing tripId or mediaAssetId.
memoryPreview.empty: No memories captured for this day yet.
capture.title.dayPlannerAdd: What should be added to this day?
capture.intro.default: Tell me what happened. I will fill in the details step by step, then write it to Journey after you confirm.
capture.intro.dayPlannerAdd: Tell me the time, place, and plan. I will organize it into this day's itinerary before you confirm.
capture.placeholder.dayPlannerAdd: Example: 18:00 leave the hotel for the first stop
capture.error.empty: Capture needs text, voice, or an attachment.
capture.photo.batchStarted: Started uploading {count} photos in the background. You can close Capture or switch pages; upload will continue.
capture.message.localAnswer: I understood this query with the local Capture state machine.
capture.message.needInfo: I understand. A little required information is still missing.
capture.message.ready: I am ready to help with the next action.
capture.message.exampleNeedInfo: I used the parsing pattern you taught me, and a little required information is still missing.
capture.message.exampleReady: I used the parsing pattern you taught me and prepared the action below.
capture.message.broadNeedInfo: I understand the direction, and a little required information is still missing.
capture.message.completed: Done. I kept this conversation so you can keep adding details later.
capture.message.contextUpdated: Got it. I added this context to the previous item.
capture.message.contextTimeUpdated: Got it. I added the time to the previous item.
capture.message.contextNeedInfo: Got it. I updated this information, and a little more is still missing.
capture.message.contextReady: Got it. The information is ready to confirm.
capture.field.title: Title
capture.question.title: Missing information
capture.question.split: How should this expense be split?
capture.question.targetPlannerItem: Which itinerary item should be changed?
capture.confirm.needMoreDescription: Add the missing details above, then save.
capture.confirm.readyDescription: After confirmation, I will write this to Journey.
highlights.title: Journey Highlights
highlights.description: Summarizes itinerary ratings and ledger spending into journey rankings.
highlights.refreshFailed: Highlights refresh failed. Keeping the current summary.
highlights.empty.spending: No spending records yet. Add hotel, flight, or meal expenses to generate category rankings.
highlights.empty.contribution: Not enough activity yet. Add itinerary items, upload memories, tag photos, or rate places to generate contribution rankings.
highlights.empty.journey: No itinerary ratings yet. Open any itinerary card and tap the star to start rating.
people.title: Members
people.description: Manage this Journey's companions, email access, roles, and nicknames / aliases. After an Owner adds a member email, that member can sign in with the same email to see this journey in OTR.
people.add.title: Add member
people.add.description: Enter a member name and email to grant access. Email can be added later; once added, the member can sign in with that email to see this Journey.
people.aliasHelp: Helps OTR identify this person in captures, itinerary, voice, and expenses.
people.placeholder.emailOptional: Member login email, can be added later
people.placeholder.alias: Bao B, separated by spaces, commas, /, or ;
people.claim.title: Claim your journey identity
people.claim.description: If the owner added your name before adding your email, you can claim it here. It is better for the owner to add your login email so OTR can recognize you automatically.
people.role.ownerHelp: Can manage members and journey permissions.
people.role.memberHelp: Can edit itinerary, add captures, and add expenses.
people.role.guestHelp: Can view and comment, but cannot add primary content.
people.notice.removedLinked: Member removed and journey access revoked.
people.error.claim: Could not claim this member identity.
map.title: Journey Map
map.enableNote: Live location updates while OTR is active. Background updates may be limited on mobile browsers.
map.locationUnavailable: Your location is not available right now. Check GPS, Wi-Fi, or browser location settings.
map.locationTimeout: Location lookup timed out. Try again in a moment.
map.noLiveMembers: No one is live right now.
map.unsupported: Location is not supported in this browser.
map.mapNote: Map tiles come later. This canvas already uses the shared map data model.
map.routeDescription: Journey route, bookings, hotels, airports, and major stops.
map.dayDescription: Locations for the selected travel day.
map.placesDescription: Hotels, restaurants, fuel, parking, emergency, and custom places.
ledger.description: Track total costs, shared expenses, personal stats, and settlement.
ledger.error.splitMembersRequired: Shared expenses need at least one split member.
ledger.dailyAnalysis.title: Daily expense analysis
ledger.dailyAnalysis.description: Costs are allocated by travel day. Multi-day expenses are averaged across their date range.
ledger.dailyAnalysis.empty: No expenses yet. Daily analysis will appear after costs are recorded.
ledger.form.editDescription: Update the amount, payer, split, date, or notes.
ledger.form.addDescription: Manual entry is here for cleanup; day cards can still detect costs from memories.
ledger.placeholder.title: Dinner in Reykjavik
ledger.statsOnlyNote: Stats only entries are included in personal trip cost stats, not final settlement.
ledger.expensesByDateDescription: All recorded costs, grouped by payment date.
ledger.empty.expenses: No expenses yet. Add the first one when someone pays for the group.
ledger.search.placeholder: Search expenses by keyword, place, payer, member...
ledger.sort.label: Sort
ledger.personalReportsDescription: Each person's real trip cost: shared share plus stats-only personal expenses.
ledger.empty.people: Add journey members before building personal reports.
ledger.sharedBalanceDescription: Only shared expenses are included here. Stats-only costs are excluded from AA settlement.
discover.title: Discover
discover.heading: Discover is coming soon
discover.description: This space is ready for the next set of OTR features.
planner.search.empty: No itinerary items matched this keyword.
planner.search.openAndExpand: Open day and expand this item
planner.day.label: Day
planner.empty.mine: Nothing directly mentions you on this day yet.
planner.empty.expenses: No expenses logged for this day.
planner.expense.statsOnlyNote: This will be used for personal trip cost stats, not final settlement.
planner.expense.linked: Linked to this schedule item and memory.
planner.field.title: Title
planner.note.empty: No notes yet. Add memory to leave details for this stop.
planner.add.placeholder: Example: 17:00 go to Costco for group groceries
timeline.title: Album
timeline.search.placeholder: Search notes, OCR, tags, people, places...
timeline.empty: No memories yet. Capture a text note or photo and it will appear here.
timeline.debug.driveIndexed: {driveCount} originals in Google Drive · {indexedCount} indexed for search
timeline.debug.noUploaded: No uploaded photos yet. Add a photo memory and it will appear here.
timeline.debug.confirmFaceHelp: Confirm or correct the suggested person. This keeps future matching inside this Journey.
timeline.debug.nonMemberHelp: Save a name for someone you met on the trip. This stays separate from members, even if the name is the same.
